data.content:
Удав
Mythical snake that swallowed an elephant in the illustration and was compared to a hat by adults. Original name: удав, which is a type of large Asian snake.

Джунгли
Vast tropical rainforest where the story takes place, specifically referring to the dense jungle with mythological creatures like the giant snake. Original name: джунгли.

Учитель
Adult who advised the narrator not to draw outside of his understanding and expertise, especially about animals and geography. Original name: учитель.

Художник
Childhood aspiration of the narrator, a profession that he gave up after failing at drawing an inside-out snake and being ridiculed by adults. Original name: художник.

Летчик
Another career chosen after abandoning childhood aspirations to become an artist. Original name: летчик.

Китай
Country in East Asia, where the narrator mentioned it can be distinguished from Arizona. Original name: Китай.

Аризона
State of United States, used by the narrator as a comparison to distinguish between different places. Original name: Аризона.

Слон
The large mammal that was swallowed by the giant snake.

Тот человек
Human individual who survived a plane crash in the Sahara desert and decided to fix his broken engine alone for survival.

Маленький принц
Маленький принц is described as a character from Antoine de Saint-Exupéry’s novella “Le Petit Prince”. He is portrayed as an unnamed, young prince who reflects deeply on life and human relationships. The prince is curious about his surroundings, especially the giant baobabs on his home planet and he understands their significance in terms of growth and fragility. He tries to share these insights with others through drawings, warning about potential dangers associated with these massive trees.

The character is described as human, young, naive, melancholic, introspective, and a visitor from another planet. There are various perspectives on his behavior; he may feel embarrassed by the behavior of a proud person. Throughout the story, Mаленький принц reflects deeply about life, human relationships, often warning against hubris and the importance of empathy.

The nameless prince is involved in an adventure across various landscapes including deserts and mountains, seeking to find his way through these places. He seeks guidance on how to truly love and be loved in the world, as well as seeking wisdom and understanding about life.<SEP>Princess in a storybook, fictional

Очень скоро я лучше узнал этот цветок
A person who deeply understood and appreciated a flower on the planet of Little Prince|

неведомая гостья
The relation name "Очень скоро я лучше узнал этот цветок, неведомая гостья" describes a character who is both beautiful and elegant. She looks at a small sprout without diverting her eyes, waits for the moment when the petals will open, invites Little Prince to go with her, gets offended that she is not grass, gets ready to present herself in a pleasing manner, reminds the Little Prince about having breakfast, and mentions a threat posed by tigers.

Четвертой планете
Четвертой планете, деловому человеку свойственна традиция посещать её регулярно. В настоящий момент он приходит ко мне и пишет мне время от времени. Однако иногда его мешают его дела. Недавно это замечание стало неверным, так как теперь он часто приходит к вам. Я живу на Четвертой планете, но посещаю её редко. Моей семьёй являются люди, о которых я говорю. Вот мой дом и это моя семья. Она моя, несмотря на всё.

человеку
(Mаленького принца, человеку)

Маленький принц иногда переписывается со своими друзьями. Он часто приезжает к ним на родину и работает много времени. Автор также делает ошибки в сложении чисел. Иногда он заходит в дом соседей и встречается с автором на работе. Маленький принц приходит ко мне на работу, но я прихожу всегда ко мне домой. В этом месте есть мой сосед и моя семья. Это мой дом. Добрый день.

Пятая планета
Маленький принц рассматривает крохотную планету, на которой нет ни домов, ни жителей, и где нужен фонарь и фонарщик для освещения.

Фонарь
Прибор, используемый фонарщиком для освещения на планете.

Фонарщик
Один из жителей Пятой планеты, заботящийся о включении и выключении своего фонаря, чтобы созвездия рождались и спали.

Лис
Лис can be interpreted as both a friendly mentor for the Little Prince and an organization of foxes who practice ancient rituals with local girls on Thursdays. The first description emphasizes intimate knowledge sharing about true love, while the second describes the Fox's role in introducing a young prince to concepts of love and human connection through mentoring. The third highlights the intimate knowledge shared between the Fox and the Little Prince, focusing on love rather than broader connections. One fourth instance mentions an organization of foxes engaging in ritual dancing with local girls. Another description portrays the Fox as merely friendly and helpful without any ritualistic or deeper connection details. Finally, one entry describes a hunting fox, indicating this might be a different entity or perhaps referring to another context not fully defined within the given descriptions.<SEP>Fox, mythical being fictional
